title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
summary: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

title: UAE reports strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
summary: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".

title: Eurovision winner Dara arrives to screaming fans in Bulgaria
summary: The 27-year-old's tune Bangaranga won Bulgaria its first ever title in the song contest.
